articles.title: Watchdog sues SEC over FOIA access to docs on potential crypto conflict of interest

articles.title: Argentine Coffee Shop Reveals x10 Rise in Crypto Pay in Past Year – Is Adoption on the Rise?
articles.description: An Argentinian coffee shop has announced a x10 rise in crypto-paying customers in the past year – and says it plans to open a branch in Chile. Per Criptonoticias, the shop is named CrypStation, and has two branches in the capital, Buenos Aires. In the past 12 months, the shop stated, over 10% of its customers have paid their bills in crypto. The shop added that the vast majority...

articles.title: Binance’s ecosystem witnesses a rebound but BNB is still not out of the woods
articles.description: After sustained periods of decline, network activity on the chain has started to rebound. The daily active users shot up to its highest level in more than a month.

articles.title: Flare Network Partners with Google Cloud for API Integrations
articles.description: Flare Network, a Ripple-supported Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM) protocol, has announced its partnership with Google Cloud. The collaboration integrates Flare's API Portal with the Google Cloud Marketplace, making it accessible to anyone with a Google Cloud account. Flare Network, a Layer 1 blockchain protocol designed to offer developers decentralized access to high-integrity data from...
